variants.global: I notice everyday smells in a room before others mention them.
variants.ghana: When I enter a room or hall, I often notice ordinary smells there before anyone else points them out.
variants.west_africa: In the place where I sit or stand, I tend to notice common smells before people around me say anything.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Là où je me trouve, je remarque souvent les odeurs du quotidien avant que les autres n'en parlent.

variants.global: Busy crowded places drain my energy faster than calm places.
variants.ghana: When a place fills with many people and movement, I feel my energy drop sooner than in a calmer setting.
variants.west_africa: In a packed market, vehicle, or gathering, I tire sooner than when the same task is done in a quiet spot.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Dans un marché animé, un car rapide plein ou une grande tabaski, je fatigue plus vite que dans un endroit calme.

variants.global: Bright overhead light starts to bother me if I stay under it a long time.
variants.ghana: If I remain under strong ceiling light for a long stretch, my eyes or head begin to feel strained.
variants.west_africa: Under bright fixed lighting for many hours, I start to feel uneasy or worn down.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une lumière vive au plafond finit par me gêner si je reste longtemps dessous.

variants.global: When noise keeps rising, I move to a calmer spot if I can.
variants.ghana: If the sound level keeps climbing, I look for a quieter corner or step outside when that is possible.
variants.west_africa: As noise builds around me, I shift toward a calmer area when there is a way to do it.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Quand le bruit augmente, je cherche un coin plus calme si je le peux.

variants.global: Rough seams or tags on clothing pull my attention away from what I am doing.
variants.ghana: Scratchy fabric edges or labels on my clothes distract me from the task in front of me.
variants.west_africa: When cloth rubs roughly on my skin, I lose focus on what I meant to finish.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les coutures rugueuses ou les étiquettes sur les vêtements me distraient de ce que je fais.

variants.global: I notice small shifts in heat or cold in a room before others comment.
variants.ghana: I feel slight changes in warmth or cool air in a space before someone else speaks about it.
variants.west_africa: Temperature changes in the air around me reach my attention early compared with people nearby.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je sens les changements de chaleur — saison sèche, pluie, courant d'air — avant que les autres n'en parlent.

variants.global: Deep engine rumble or heavy machine vibration catches my attention quickly.
variants.ghana: Low shaking from engines or big machines pulls my attention as soon as it starts.
variants.west_africa: Strong steady vibration from motors or equipment stands out to me right away.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Le ronflement d'un groupe électrogène ou les vibrations d'une moto attirent vite mon attention.

variants.global: After someone shouts very close to me, I need a little time before I feel steady again.
variants.ghana: When a person raises their voice right beside me, I take a short while before I feel settled.
variants.west_africa: Loud speech pressed near my ear leaves me needing a brief pause before I feel normal.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après qu'on m'a parlé très fort tout près, j'ai besoin d'un moment avant de me sentir à nouveau stable.

variants.global: People can tell from my face or body when a place feels too loud for me.
variants.ghana: Others around me can see signs that the noise level is too much for me.
variants.west_africa: My expression or posture shows when sound in a place is overwhelming me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les autres peuvent lire sur mon visage ou mon corps qu'un endroit est trop bruyant pour moi.

variants.global: After an overstimulating spell, I need a quiet break before I can focus well again.
variants.ghana: When a spell feels overstimulating, I recover focus faster if I get a quiet pause.
variants.west_africa: I work best again only after some calm time following a very stimulating stretch.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après une période de forte stimulation, j'ai besoin d'une pause calme pour retrouver ma concentration.

variants.global: If music or a speaker is very loud, I turn it down or step away when I am allowed.
variants.ghana: When playback is far too loud, I lower the volume or leave the spot if that is acceptable.
variants.west_africa: Very loud sound from a device or speaker leads me to reduce it or move off when I can.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Si la musique ou un haut-parleur est trop fort, je baisse le volume ou m'éloigne quand c'est possible.

variants.global: Food textures that are very slimy or very rough are hard to ignore while I eat.
variants.ghana: While eating, textures that are extremely slippery or coarse stay on my mind.
variants.west_africa: Certain mouth-feels while chewing keep pulling my attention even if I want to think of something else.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les textures très gluantes ou très rugueuses sont difficiles à ignorer pendant que je mange.

variants.global: I choose a seat away from flashing or flickering lights when I have a choice.
variants.ghana: Given a choice, I sit where lights do not flicker or flash in my eyes.
variants.west_africa: If seats are open, I pick one that avoids strobe-like or broken-bulb flicker.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Quand j'ai le choix, je m'assois loin des lumières qui clignotent ou vacillent.

variants.global: Crowded busy places feel about the same to my energy as quiet places.
variants.ghana: A full room and an empty room feel roughly equal in how much energy they take from me.
variants.west_africa: Whether a place is packed or nearly empty barely changes how tired I feel.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les endroits très animés et les endroits calmes demandent à peu près la même énergie de ma part.

variants.global: Strong overhead light rarely bothers me even after many hours.
variants.ghana: Ceiling lights can stay bright for a long time without me feeling strained.
variants.west_africa: I can stay under bright fixed lights a long while without discomfort.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une forte lumière au plafond me gêne rarement, même après de longues heures.

variants.global: Rising noise rarely makes me look for a different spot.
variants.ghana: Louder and louder sound around me seldom pushes me to relocate.
variants.west_africa: I usually stay put even when the noise level climbs around me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un bruit qui monte me pousse rarement à changer de place.

variants.global: Rough clothing seams rarely distract me from my task.
variants.ghana: Tags and coarse seams on clothes seldom pull me off track.
variants.west_africa: Fabric rubbing roughly hardly breaks my concentration.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les coutures rugueuses sur les vêtements me distraient rarement de ma tâche.

variants.global: I rarely notice small heat or cold shifts unless someone points them out.
variants.ghana: Minor temperature changes in a room usually pass me by until another person mentions them.
variants.west_africa: Slight warm or cool shifts in the air seldom reach my attention first.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je remarque rarement les petits changements de chaleur ou de fraîcheur sans qu'on me le signale.

variants.global: Engine rumble or machine vibration blends into the background for me.
variants.ghana: Heavy low vibration from equipment is easy for me to tune out.
variants.west_africa: Motor rumble fades into the background without grabbing me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Le ronflement d'un moteur se fond dans le fond pour moi.

variants.global: Loud speech near me rarely leaves me feeling off balance for more than a moment.
variants.ghana: A shout close by unsettles me only briefly, if at all.
variants.west_africa: Sharp loud words beside me hardly ripple my calm.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une voix forte tout près me déséquilibre rarement plus qu'un instant.

variants.global: Others rarely read discomfort on my face about the noise level.
variants.ghana: People seldom see from my look that sound is too much for me.
variants.west_africa: My face does not often show that noise is overwhelming.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les autres lisent rarement mon malaise sur mon visage à cause du bruit.

variants.global: I return to clear focus quickly right after a very stimulating stretch.
variants.ghana: Right after heavy stimulation, I snap back to focus without needing much pause.
variants.west_africa: I do not need a long quiet gap before thinking clearly again after intensity.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je retrouve vite une concentration claire juste après une période très stimulante.

variants.global: Very loud music or announcements rarely make me lower the volume or leave.
variants.ghana: Even when playback is extremely loud, I usually stay and accept it.
variants.west_africa: Blaring sound seldom leads me to turn it down or walk away.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une musique ou une annonce très forte me pousse rarement à baisser le volume ou à partir.

variants.global: Extreme slimy or rough food textures rarely bother me while eating.
variants.ghana: Unusual mouth-feel during meals seldom distracts me.
variants.west_africa: Texture surprises in food hardly pull my mind away.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les textures très gluantes ou rugueuses me gênent rarement en mangeant.

variants.global: Flickering or flashing lights rarely change where I choose to sit.
variants.ghana: Broken-bulb flicker or flashing signs seldom affect my seat choice.
variants.west_africa: I pick seats without thinking about flicker risk.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les lumières qui clignotent influencent rarement où je choisis de m'asseoir.

variants.global: When I mean to finish one task, unrelated sounds often pull my mind away.
variants.ghana: While I am trying to finish one piece of work, background sounds often steal my thoughts.
variants.west_africa: If I plan to stick to a single job, side noises still snatch my attention.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Quand je compte finir une seule tâche, les bruits autour — marché, radio, appels — arrachent encore mon attention.

variants.global: I jump between small tasks many times before the main one is done.
variants.ghana: I hop among minor jobs again and again before the big task reaches the end.
variants.west_africa: Little side errands split my time before the chief task is closed.
variants.francophone_west_africa: De petites courses annexes morcellent mon temps avant que la tâche principale soit terminée.

variants.global: I can read or listen to instructions for a long stretch without losing the thread.
variants.ghana: I hold the line of a long explanation in my head while reading or listening.
variants.west_africa: Long guidance stays clear in my mind while I take it in.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une longue consigne reste claire dans ma tête pendant que je la reçois.

variants.global: Small mistakes in a form or list jump out at me while I check it.
variants.ghana: When I scan a list or form, little errors show up to me quickly.
variants.west_africa: Typos or missing lines catch my eye during review.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les fautes de frappe ou les lignes manquantes me sautent aux yeux quand je relis.

variants.global: A new message alert often interrupts me even when I planned to wait.
variants.ghana: Ping from a device often breaks my plan to stay off it for a while.
variants.west_africa: Notifications cut in when I meant to stay focused elsewhere.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les notifications m'interrompent alors que je voulais rester concentré ailleurs.

variants.global: I return to the same task after a short break and pick up where I left off.
variants.ghana: After stepping away briefly, I slide back into the same task smoothly.
variants.west_africa: A pause does not erase my place in the work I was doing.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une pause n'efface pas ma place dans le travail que je faisais.

variants.global: Doing two simple chores at once, like stirring and watching a pot, feels natural.
variants.ghana: Pairing two easy physical routines at the same time feels fine to me.
variants.west_africa: Light dual tasks side by side do not confuse me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Deux petites tâches en parallèle ne me déroutent pas.

variants.global: I rely on a written note or mark so I do not forget the next step.
variants.ghana: I leave myself a short written cue for the next action so it is not lost.
variants.west_africa: A scrap of paper or phone note guards the next step in my mind.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un bout de papier ou une note sur le téléphone me rappelle la prochaine étape.

variants.global: Background chatter fades for me when I decide to lock onto one speaker.
variants.ghana: When I choose one voice to follow, other voices drop in importance in my ears.
variants.west_africa: I can narrow listening to one person amid side talk.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je peux écouter une seule personne malgré les conversations autour.

variants.global: I lose track of time when I am deeply into a hands-on task I enjoy.
variants.ghana: Hours can pass unnoticed when I am absorbed in a satisfying manual task.
variants.west_africa: A hands-on project I like can swallow my sense of clock time.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un travail manuel qui me plaît peut faire oublier le temps qui passe.

variants.global: Switching tools mid-task costs me a moment to remember what comes next.
variants.ghana: Changing tools in the middle of a job creates a short blank in my sequence memory.
variants.west_africa: Each tool swap needs a beat before the next move is clear.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Chaque changement d'outil demande un moment avant que le geste suivant soit clair.

variants.global: I skim a page and miss a line that was clearly printed there.
variants.ghana: Quick reading makes me skip a printed line that was present.
variants.west_africa: Fast scanning lets a visible line slip past me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: En parcourant vite un texte, une ligne visible peut m'échapper.

variants.global: Unrelated sounds rarely pull me off a task I meant to finish.
variants.ghana: Side noise seldom steals me from a job I chose to complete.
variants.west_africa: Background sound hardly breaks the task I locked onto.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Le bruit de fond casse rarement la tâche sur laquelle je me suis concentré.

variants.global: I stay on one task until it is done before opening side tasks.
variants.ghana: I close the main job before I open smaller ones.
variants.west_africa: Side errands wait until the chief task is finished.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les courses annexes attendent que la tâche principale soit finie.

variants.global: Long stretches of reading or listening often lose me halfway.
variants.ghana: Extended explanations often drift out of my grasp midway.
variants.west_africa: Long guidance tends to blur before the end.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une longue consigne a tendance à s'estomper avant la fin.

variants.global: Small errors in a list are easy for me to miss on first pass.
variants.ghana: Little mistakes hide from me during a quick check.
variants.west_africa: First scan of a form often leaves errors unseen.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un premier passage sur un formulaire laisse souvent des erreurs non vues.

variants.global: I can ignore new message alerts when I planned a focus block.
variants.ghana: Planned focus time usually holds even when the device pings.
variants.west_africa: I keep alerts from breaking a focus block I set.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je parviens à empêcher les alertes de rompre un bloc de concentration que j'ai fixé.

variants.global: After a break I often need to rebuild the whole picture of the task.
variants.ghana: Returning from pause, I rebuild the task picture slowly.
variants.west_africa: Post-break restart feels like starting near the beginning.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après une pause, reprendre ressemble souvent à recommencer presque depuis le début.

variants.global: Even two simple chores at once feel tangled for me.
variants.ghana: Pairing two easy routines at once confuses my hands or thoughts.
variants.west_africa: Dual light tasks feel knotted rather than smooth.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Deux petites tâches en parallèle me semblent enchevêtrées plutôt que fluides.

variants.global: I remember the next step without needing a written cue most of the time.
variants.ghana: Next steps stay in mind without paper or phone reminders.
variants.west_africa: I seldom need a note for what comes next.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'ai rarement besoin d'une note pour savoir quelle est la prochaine étape.

variants.global: Side chatter stays loud in my mind even when I try to focus on one speaker.
variants.ghana: Other voices stay prominent even when I pick one person to hear.
variants.west_africa: Background talk keeps competing when I aim at one voice.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les conversations de fond continuent de rivaliser quand je vise une seule voix.

variants.global: I rarely lose track of clock time during hands-on work.
variants.ghana: Hands-on tasks keep my sense of passing hours steady.
variants.west_africa: Clock awareness stays sharp even in absorbing manual work.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Ma conscience du temps reste vive même dans un travail manuel absorbant.

variants.global: Switching tools mid-task feels seamless with almost no pause.
variants.ghana: Tool changes mid-job flow without a hitch.
variants.west_africa: Moving from one implement to another is instant for me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Passer d'un outil à l'autre est presque instantané pour moi.

variants.global: A careful read usually catches every printed line.
variants.ghana: Slow read picks up each line that is on the page.
variants.west_africa: Line-by-line review rarely skips visible text.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une relecture ligne par ligne saute rarement du texte visible.

variants.global: I can keep mental focus on one topic through long waiting periods.
variants.ghana: Waiting a long time in a queue does not scatter my thoughts from the topic I chose.
variants.west_africa: Long waits leave my chosen topic stable in mind.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une longue attente — file au bureau, car rapide — laisse mon sujet stable en tête.

variants.global: When plans shift at short notice, I adjust what I do next without much fuss.
variants.ghana: If the time or place of a meeting changes late, I rearrange my next steps calmly.
variants.west_africa: Sudden plan changes lead me to update my next moves without long upset.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un changement soudain de programme me pousse à ajuster mes prochains gestes sans longtemps perdre pied.

variants.global: Long waits in a queue feel harder if I have nothing useful in hand to do.
variants.ghana: Standing in line for a long stretch drags more when my hands and mind are idle.
variants.west_africa: Empty-handed waiting in a long line wears on me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Attendre les mains vides dans une longue file au marché ou au guichet m'épuise.

variants.global: I arrive within the window others expect when the time was agreed in advance.
variants.ghana: When a time was fixed ahead, I show up inside the range people expect.
variants.west_africa: Agreed meeting times see me there in the expected span.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Aux heures convenues, j'arrive dans le créneau attendu.

variants.global: If a task takes longer than guessed, I extend the time I give it without panic.
variants.ghana: When work runs past the first guess, I widen the slot instead of rushing wildly.
variants.west_africa: Underestimated duration gets more room rather than panic.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Quand la durée est sous-estimée, j'élargis le créneau plutôt que de paniquer.

variants.global: I break a big job into timed chunks with short rests in between.
variants.ghana: Large work gets split into blocks with brief rests between.
variants.west_africa: Chunk-and-rest pacing is how I tackle long jobs.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Découper en morceaux avec des pauses, c'est ma façon d'aborder les longues tâches.

variants.global: A clear deadline helps me finish rather than stalls me.
variants.ghana: Knowing the end time pushes me forward instead of freezing me.
variants.west_africa: Fixed end dates spur completion rather than block starts.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une date butoir fixe pousse à terminer plutôt qu'à bloquer le départ.

variants.global: I forget upcoming appointments unless I put them on a list or phone.
variants.ghana: Future times slip unless I record them on paper or device.
variants.west_africa: Dates ahead vanish from mind without a written or digital reminder.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les dates à venir disparaissent de ma tête sans rappel écrit ou sur le téléphone.

variants.global: Switching from rest to work mode takes me several minutes.
variants.ghana: Moving from rest into active work needs a few minutes of ramp-up.
variants.west_africa: Cold start from break to labor is not instant for me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Reprendre le travail après une pause n'est pas instantané pour moi.

variants.global: Group work moves faster than I expected when everyone knows their part.
variants.ghana: Team tasks finish sooner than I thought when roles are clear.
variants.west_africa: Clear division of labor speeds group jobs beyond my first guess.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un partage clair des rôles accélère le travail de groupe au-delà de ma première estimation.

variants.global: I underestimate how long travel will take when roads are busy.
variants.ghana: Busy routes make my travel guess too short.
variants.west_africa: Traffic-heavy trips run longer than my first estimate.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un trajet en car rapide ou en taxi dans le trafic dépasse souvent ma première estimation.

variants.global: Repeating the same morning steps in the same order settles me.
variants.ghana: Same order of morning actions steadies my start.
variants.west_africa: Fixed morning sequence calms my entry into the day.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une routine du matin fixe calme mon entrée dans la journée.

variants.global: If someone arrives late, I use the gap for a small useful task.
variants.ghana: Late arrival by others becomes a slot for a tiny useful chore.
variants.west_africa: Unexpected gaps become pockets for small wins.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les trous imprévus deviennent des moments pour de petites victoires.

variants.global: Short-notice plan changes leave me rattled for a while.
variants.ghana: Late changes to time or place unsettle me before I can move on.
variants.west_africa: Sudden shifts in schedule throw me off first, then I adapt.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les changements soudains d'emploi du temps me déstabilisent d'abord, puis je m'adapte.

variants.global: Long queues feel fine even with nothing in hand to occupy me.
variants.ghana: Waiting in line a long time without activity does not bother me.
variants.west_africa: Idle long waits are easy on my mood.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une longue attente inactive est facile à supporter pour mon humeur.

variants.global: Agreed times are hard for me to hit even when I try.
variants.ghana: Expected arrival windows slip for me despite effort.
variants.west_africa: People sometimes wait for me even when I intend to be prompt.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les gens attendent parfois pour moi même quand je compte être ponctuel.

variants.global: When a task runs long, I feel rushed rather than widening the slot.
variants.ghana: Past-guess duration makes me hurry instead of calmly extending time.
variants.west_africa: Overrun tasks trigger rush feelings.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les tâches qui dépassent le temps prévu déclenchent un sentiment de précipitation.

variants.global: I prefer to push through a big job in one stretch without timed breaks.
variants.ghana: Large jobs feel better in one long push than in timed chunks.
variants.west_africa: I avoid chunk timers on long work.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'évite les minuteurs par morceaux sur le travail de longue durée.

variants.global: A firm deadline makes me freeze or delay starting.
variants.ghana: End dates make starting harder rather than easier.
variants.west_africa: Deadlines stall my opening move.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les échéances bloquent mon premier geste.

variants.global: I keep upcoming times in mind without lists or phone reminders.
variants.ghana: Future appointments stay in memory without writing them down.
variants.west_africa: I rarely miss a time I only heard spoken once.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je rate rarement une heure entendue une seule fois à l'oral.

variants.global: I snap from rest to full work speed almost immediately.
variants.ghana: Break to labor shift happens in seconds.
variants.west_africa: Rest ends and work speed peaks at once.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La fin du repos et le pic de vitesse au travail arrivent d'un coup pour moi.

variants.global: Group work often runs longer than I first guessed.
variants.ghana: Team tasks drag past my opening estimate.
variants.west_africa: Shared jobs expand in clock time versus my plan.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les travaux partagés s'allongent en temps par rapport à mon plan.

variants.global: I overguess travel time even when roads are clear.
variants.ghana: I pad travel time more than traffic needs.
variants.west_africa: Clear roads still get a long time buffer from me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Même avec les routes dégagées, je garde une longue marge de temps.

variants.global: Changing the order of morning steps does not unsettle me.
variants.ghana: Shuffled morning order leaves me fine.
variants.west_africa: Morning sequence can vary without cost.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La routine du matin peut varier sans me coûter grand-chose.

variants.global: Late arrival by others frustrates me and I struggle to use the gap.
variants.ghana: When others are late, the open minutes feel wasted and irritating.
variants.west_africa: Waiting on latecomers drains me without productive use.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Attendre des retardataires me vide sans usage productif.

variants.global: I expect solo tasks and group tasks to take about the same clock time.
variants.ghana: I budget equal minutes for alone work and shared work.
variants.west_africa: Team versus solo duration feels similar in my planning.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La durée en équipe et en solo me semble similaire quand je planifie.

variants.global: In a group talk, I wait for a clear pause before I add my point.
variants.ghana: When many voices overlap, I hold my words until a calm opening appears.
variants.west_africa: In overlapping speech, I wait for a settled gap before speaking.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Quand plusieurs personnes parlent en même temps, j'attends un silence net avant de prendre la parole.

variants.global: I speak up as soon as I have something to add, even if others are still talking.
variants.ghana: If I have a thought, I offer it even while side talk continues.
variants.west_africa: I insert my point when ready rather than waiting for full quiet.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'insère mon propos quand je suis prêt plutôt que d'attendre le silence complet.

variants.global: I yield the floor when someone else has been waiting with a raised hand.
variants.ghana: If another person has waited visibly, I pass the turn.
variants.west_africa: Visible wait gets my silence so they can speak.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Quand quelqu'un attend visiblement, je me tais pour le laisser parler.

variants.global: I finish my full thought even if another person is ready to speak.
variants.ghana: I close my thought before yielding even when someone is poised.
variants.west_africa: I complete my line before opening space.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je termine ma phrase avant d'ouvrir l'espace aux autres.

variants.global: I slow my speech when the other person looks confused.
variants.ghana: Confusion on the other face leads me to ease my pace.
variants.west_africa: I stretch words slower when understanding seems low.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'articule plus lentement quand la compréhension semble faible.

variants.global: I keep the same speech speed even when the listener looks lost.
variants.ghana: Listener confusion does not change my talking speed much.
variants.west_africa: My pace stays steady regardless of puzzled looks.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Mon débit reste stable malgré des regards perplexes.

variants.global: I check whether the other person understood by asking a short question.
variants.ghana: I use a brief check question after giving instructions.
variants.west_africa: After directions, I ask a tiny confirmation question.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après des consignes, je pose une petite question de confirmation.

variants.global: I move on after instructions without checking if they were clear.
variants.ghana: I leave instructions and assume all is clear unless someone stops me.
variants.west_africa: I rarely ask a quick check after I explain steps.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je demande rarement une vérification rapide après avoir expliqué les étapes.

variants.global: If someone did not hear me, I repeat the same point in simpler shorter words.
variants.ghana: When my line was missed, I say it again shorter and plainer.
variants.west_africa: Missed hearing gets a brief second version from me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Si je n'ai pas bien entendu, je reformule brièvement.

variants.global: If someone did not hear me, I repeat the same long wording again.
variants.ghana: After a miss, I say the same long line a second time.
variants.west_africa: My second try uses the same long phrasing as the first.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Ma deuxième tentative reprend la même formulation longue que la première.

variants.global: I notice hand signals or nods that mean wait or go ahead.
variants.ghana: Small hand or head cues that mean pause or continue are visible to me.
variants.west_africa: Silent turn cues read clearly for me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les signaux silencieux de tour de parole me sont clairs.

variants.global: Small wait-or-go cues from hands or head often pass me by.
variants.ghana: Tiny silent cues about turn-taking slip past me.
variants.west_africa: Hand and nod signals about pausing are easy to miss for me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les gestes ou hochements indiquant une pause m'échappent facilement.

variants.global: I can follow one quiet speaker even when side chatter continues.
variants.ghana: One low voice stays clear to me amid background talk.
variants.west_africa: Soft main speaker plus side noise still works for my listening.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une voix principale douce avec du bruit latéral fonctionne encore pour mon écoute.

variants.global: Side chatter makes one quiet speaker hard for me to track.
variants.ghana: Background talk drowns a soft main voice for me.
variants.west_africa: Low lead voice plus chatter loses me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une voix principale basse plus le bavardage autour me perdent.

variants.global: I leave a short quiet gap so someone else can join.
variants.ghana: I leave a small open space in the talk so another person can enter.
variants.west_africa: I pause briefly so another voice can enter the talk.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je marque une courte pause pour qu'une autre voix entre dans l'échange.

variants.global: I jump in during short gaps before others have finished their line.
variants.ghana: I enter the gap early, before the other line feels fully closed.
variants.west_africa: I start speaking in small openings even if the line may not be done.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je commence à parler dans de petites ouvertures même si la phrase n'est peut-être pas finie.

variants.global: After a noisy spell, I repeat a key word slowly before I go on.
variants.ghana: When noise just dropped, I say a key word again, slowly, then continue.
variants.west_africa: After loud noise, I restate one key word at a slower pace.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après un bruit fort — moto, haut-parleur — je répète un mot clé plus lentement.

variants.global: After a noisy spell, I continue without repeating a key word.
variants.ghana: When noise ends, I move on without restating a key word.
variants.west_africa: I do not restate a key word after the room was loud.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je ne répète pas un mot clé après que la pièce a été bruyante.

variants.global: When several people speak at once, I lower my volume so one line can come through.
variants.ghana: If many voices clash, I soften my voice so one line can surface.
variants.west_africa: During overlap, I speak more softly so one thread can win through.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Pendant le chevauchement, je parle plus doucement pour qu'un fil puisse passer.

variants.global: When several people speak at once, I raise my volume so I am heard.
variants.ghana: If many voices clash, I push my voice louder to break through.
variants.west_africa: During overlap, I speak up louder to cut through.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Pendant le chevauchement, je hausse la voix pour percer.

variants.global: I point to what I mean when words alone might be unclear.
variants.ghana: If words might confuse, I point at the object or place I mean.
variants.west_africa: I use a pointing gesture when plain words might miss.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'utilise un geste de la main quand les mots simples risquent de ne pas suffire.

variants.global: I rely on words only even when pointing would make the meaning clearer.
variants.ghana: Even when a gesture would help, I stick to words alone.
variants.west_africa: I avoid pointing even when it would clear things up.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'évite de montrer du doigt même quand cela clarifierait les choses.

variants.global: I lose thread of a story if several people jump in without order.
variants.ghana: A tale told out of turn by many speakers confuses my tracking.
variants.west_africa: Unordered jump-ins make me lose the narrative line.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les interventions désordonnées me font perdre le fil du récit.

variants.global: Many unordered speakers do not confuse me; I rebuild the story.
variants.ghana: Jumping speakers still leave me with a clear story picture.
variants.west_africa: Chaotic turn order does not lose me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: L'ordre chaotique des tours de parole ne me perd pas.

variants.global: I step half a step back when someone steps forward to speak.
variants.ghana: If a person moves forward to speak, I make a small space with my feet.
variants.west_africa: When someone advances to talk, I ease back a little.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Quand quelqu'un s'avance pour parler, je cède un peu.

variants.global: I write numbered steps before starting a new multi-step chore.
variants.ghana: Fresh many-step tasks get a numbered list from me first.
variants.west_africa: New complex chores start with ordered notes.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une nouvelle tâche complexe commence par des notes ordonnées.

variants.global: I like open-ended days where tasks can reshuffle freely.
variants.ghana: Flexible days with reshuffle room feel better than rigid slots.
variants.west_africa: Open schedules please me more than fixed minute maps.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des emplois du temps ouverts me plaisent plus que des plannings à la minute.

variants.global: Clear written rules lower my stress in shared spaces.
variants.ghana: Posted plain rules calm me in shared work or living areas.
variants.west_africa: Visible simple rules ease me in common spaces.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des règles simples visibles m'apaisent dans les espaces partagés.

variants.global: If materials are missing, I improvise with what is nearby.
variants.ghana: Absent tools lead me to nearby substitutes.
variants.west_africa: Gaps in supplies spark on-the-spot swaps.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les manques de fournitures déclenchent des remplacements sur le moment.

variants.global: I pack bags the night before a morning trip.
variants.ghana: Evening-before packing is my habit for early travel.
variants.west_africa: Morning trips get bags ready the prior night.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Pour les sorties du matin, je prépare les sacs la veille au soir.

variants.global: Surprise visits feel disruptive when I had a fixed task list.
variants.ghana: Unplanned guests clash with a tight written list day.
variants.west_africa: Pop-in visits jar me on list-heavy days.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les visites surprises me dérangent les jours chargés de listes.

variants.global: I reset objects to the same spots so I can find them again.
variants.ghana: Things return to fixed homes so search is short.
variants.west_africa: Stable object homes speed finding.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des places stables pour les objets accélèrent la recherche.

variants.global: I question a rule that blocks safety or fairness even if it is written.
variants.ghana: Written rules that risk harm or unfairness get a spoken question from me.
variants.west_africa: I raise concerns about bad posted rules.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je soulève des inquiétudes quand des règles affichées me semblent mauvaises.

variants.global: Doing steps out of order on purpose feels uncomfortable if order matters for quality.
variants.ghana: Wrong order on purpose feels off when order affects outcome.
variants.west_africa: Sequence jumps unsettle me when sequence affects results.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Sauter des étapes me déstabilise quand l'ordre influence le résultat.

variants.global: I prefer a recipe or pattern the first time I try a new craft.
variants.ghana: First attempt at a craft wants a pattern in hand.
variants.west_africa: New craft starts with a model to copy.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un nouvel artisanat commence par un modèle à copier.

variants.global: I estimate time for each subtask before I begin.
variants.ghana: Subtask minutes get guessed before start.
variants.west_africa: I slice total time across parts ahead of work.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je répartis le temps total entre les parties avant de travailler.

variants.global: I enjoy discovering the path while moving rather than mapping everything first.
variants.ghana: Forward motion with partial map feels fun.
variants.west_africa: Full pre-map is less fun than discover-as-I-go.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Tout pré-planifier est moins plaisant pour moi que découvrir en avançant.

variants.global: I start multi-step chores without writing steps first.
variants.ghana: Many-step jobs begin straight from the head without lists.
variants.west_africa: I launch complex tasks without numbered prep.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je lance des tâches complexes sans préparation numérotée.

variants.global: Tight schedules with little reshuffle room feel better to me than loose days.
variants.ghana: Minute-tight plans beat fully open days for my comfort.
variants.west_africa: I prefer heavy structure over floating tasks.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je préfère une forte structure aux tâches flottantes.

variants.global: Posted rules feel neutral or slightly stressful rather than calming.
variants.ghana: Wall rules neither calm nor excite me; slight stress.
variants.west_africa: Written shared rules add little comfort.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des règles partagées écrites ajoutent peu de confort pour moi.

variants.global: Missing materials stall me until the right tool appears.
variants.ghana: Without exact supplies I pause rather than swap.
variants.west_africa: Wrong-tool work is hard to start.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Commencer sans le bon outil me est difficile.

variants.global: I pack on the morning of travel rather than the night before.
variants.ghana: Travel bags get packed at wake time.
variants.west_africa: Same-day morning pack is my norm.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Préparer le sac le matin même est ma norme.

variants.global: Surprise visits feel welcome even on a fixed task day.
variants.ghana: Unplanned guests fit fine beside a list.
variants.west_africa: Drop-in visitors sit well with planned chores.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les visiteurs de passage s'accordent bien avec les corvées planifiées.

variants.global: I leave tools where I last used them and search later.
variants.ghana: Objects rest where dropped until needed again.
variants.west_africa: Floating placement is my habit.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Laisser les choses où elles tombent est mon habitude.

variants.global: I keep the same tool layout between sessions so I can grab fast.
variants.ghana: Tools return to the same layout each time so my hand finds them fast.
variants.west_africa: I reset my workspace layout the same way between sessions.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je réorganise mon espace de travail de la même façon entre les sessions.

variants.global: Order of steps rarely matters to me if the end result looks fine.
variants.ghana: End quality OK means order felt flexible to me.
variants.west_africa: Step sequence is loose in my mind.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La séquence des étapes est lâche dans ma tête.

variants.global: I try a new craft first by experimenting without a pattern.
variants.ghana: Pattern-free first trial is my craft style.
variants.west_africa: New making starts with free play.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une nouvelle fabrication commence par le jeu libre.

variants.global: I begin work and discover time needs as I go.
variants.ghana: Clock needs reveal during the job.
variants.west_africa: No upfront subtask time guesses.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je ne devine pas le temps par sous-tâche à l'avance.

variants.global: I want the full map before any first step.
variants.ghana: Complete preview before motion feels required.
variants.west_africa: All-at-once planning precedes action.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Tout planifier d'un bloc précède l'action.

variants.global: Shared tidy zones matter less to me than finishing the job.
variants.ghana: End finish beats mid-way neat placement for me.
variants.west_africa: Completion tops strict tidiness.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Terminer prime sur un rangement strict.

variants.global: When the method must change mid-task, I switch without long complaint.
variants.ghana: A required method swap mid-job gets a quick shift from me.
variants.west_africa: Forced path change mid-task draws little grumble time.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un changement de cap forcé en pleine tâche m'accorde peu de temps de rouspétance.

variants.global: Trying a new route to a familiar place feels refreshing.
variants.ghana: A different path to the same end feels like a treat.
variants.west_africa: Unfamiliar roads to known places please me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des chemins inconnus vers des lieux connus me plaisent.

variants.global: I feel uneasy the first day a daily routine is interrupted.
variants.ghana: Day one of a broken routine feels off in my body.
variants.west_africa: Routine break day one unsettles me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Casser la routine le premier jour me déstabilise.

variants.global: If a tool breaks, I look for another object that can do the job.
variants.ghana: Tool failure sends me hunting for a stand-in object.
variants.west_africa: Broken gear triggers substitute search.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un outil en panne déclenche la recherche d'un substitut.

variants.global: New faces in a steady work group take me a meeting or two to adjust to.
variants.ghana: Fresh members in a fixed team need a couple meets from me.
variants.west_africa: Steady crew changes need warm-up meets.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des changements d'équipe réguliers demandent des mises en route chaleureuses.

variants.global: Weather shifts my outdoor plan and I rebuild the plan fast.
variants.ghana: Rain or wind reshapes outdoor work with quick replan.
variants.west_africa: Sky change gets a fast alternate plan.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un changement de ciel — pluie soudaine, harmattan — pousse vite un plan de repli.

variants.global: I revisit old habits even when a new habit would work better.
variants.ghana: Better new habit still loses to old groove sometimes.
variants.west_africa: Comfort habit wins over improved new pattern at times.
variants.francophone_west_africa: L'habitude confortable l'emporte parfois sur une nouvelle façon améliorée.

variants.global: I need the reason for a rule change before I accept the new rule.
variants.ghana: Rule swaps want a clear why from me.
variants.west_africa: New rules need rationale to stick.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les nouvelles règles ont besoin d'une justification pour tenir.

variants.global: Updated software layout slows me down until I explore every corner.
variants.ghana: Fresh app layout needs a full click tour before speed returns.
variants.west_africa: UI redesign needs exploration time.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un changement d'interface demande du temps d'exploration.

variants.global: Canceled plans free me to do something else useful quickly.
variants.ghana: Plan drops become quick slots for other useful acts.
variants.west_africa: Cancelation redirects me fast to next useful thing.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une annulation me redirige vite vers la prochaine chose utile.

variants.global: I sample unfamiliar food willingly when ingredients are named.
variants.ghana: Named parts make unknown dishes OK to taste.
variants.west_africa: Ingredient labels open me to new plates.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des ingrédients inconnus m'ouvrent à de nouveaux plats.

variants.global: I return smoothly to a routine after a holiday break.
variants.ghana: Post-holiday rhythm snaps back for me.
variants.west_africa: After time off, old daily pattern returns easily.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après un congé, l'ancien rythme quotidien revient facilement.

variants.global: Method change mid-task frustrates me for a noticeable stretch.
variants.ghana: Mid-job method swap costs me mood time.
variants.west_africa: Path change mid-task irritates before I move on.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un changement de chemin en pleine tâche m'irrite avant de passer à la suite.

variants.global: A new route to a familiar place feels like unnecessary risk.
variants.ghana: Different roads to the same place feel risky not fun.
variants.west_africa: Alternate paths feel needless.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les chemins alternatifs me semblent superflus.

variants.global: First interrupted routine day feels fine to me.
variants.ghana: Routine break day one feels normal.
variants.west_africa: Day-one routine gap does not shake me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un trou dans la routine du premier jour ne me secoue pas.

variants.global: Tool break stops the job until the exact tool is fixed or replaced.
variants.ghana: Without the right tool I halt rather than substitute.
variants.west_africa: Exact-tool dependence on failure.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Sans l'outil exact, j'ai du mal à avancer quand quelque chose casse.

variants.global: New people in a steady group feel instantly normal to me.
variants.ghana: Fresh faces slot in immediately for me.
variants.west_africa: Instant comfort with new team members.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je suis à l'aise tout de suite avec de nouveaux membres d'équipe.

variants.global: Weather change leaves me stuck without a new plan for a while.
variants.ghana: Sky shift freezes my planning for a bit.
variants.west_africa: Weather turns create plan blanks.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les retournements de météo créent des blancs dans mon plan.

variants.global: I adopt a better new habit quickly when I see it works.
variants.ghana: Shown better habit swaps in fast for me.
variants.west_africa: Evidence of improvement drives fast habit swap.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une preuve d'amélioration me pousse à changer d'habitude vite.

variants.global: I accept a rule change on brief notice without needing a long reason.
variants.ghana: Short notice rule change sits fine without deep why.
variants.west_africa: New rule on brief word works for me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une nouvelle règle annoncée en peu de mots me suffit.

variants.global: Updated software feels intuitive right away.
variants.ghana: New layout clicks immediately.
variants.west_africa: Redesign speeds me up from day one.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un redesign me rend plus rapide dès le premier jour.

variants.global: Canceled plans leave me drifting unsure what to do next.
variants.ghana: Dropped plans create empty unsure minutes.
variants.west_africa: Cancelation empties my next move.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une annulation vide ma prochaine action.

variants.global: Unfamiliar food makes me refuse even when ingredients are named.
variants.ghana: Unknown dishes get a no even with parts listed.
variants.west_africa: Named unfamiliar plates still get declined.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des plats inconnus nommés sont encore refusés par moi.

variants.global: After a long break, rebuilding routine takes many days.
variants.ghana: Holiday return stretches routine rebuild across days.
variants.west_africa: Slow return to rhythm after time away.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Le retour au rythme après une absence est lent pour moi.

variants.global: I combine odd objects creatively when standard tools are gone.
variants.ghana: No standard tool sparks creative mashups from me.
variants.west_africa: Odd combos finish jobs without proper gear.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des combinaisons bizarres finissent le travail sans le bon matériel.

variants.global: I return to a hard task after a short walk instead of abandoning it.
variants.ghana: Tough task plus brief walk brings me back to try again.
variants.west_africa: Hard job gets another round after a stroll.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après une tâche dure, une autre manche est possible après une promenade.

variants.global: Heavy physical work leads me to drink water and sit before the next chore.
variants.ghana: Big exertion gets water plus sit before round two.
variants.west_africa: After hard labor I hydrate and rest briefly.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après un travail pénible sous le soleil, je m'hydrate et me repose brièvement.

variants.global: I push to finish a boring but important task the same day I started.
variants.ghana: Dull-but-needed work closes same day it opens.
variants.west_africa: Important boring jobs do not cross midnight idle.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les corvées importantes mais ennuyeuses ne restent pas inachevées jusqu'à minuit.

variants.global: I notice muscle soreness and lighten the next task on purpose.
variants.ghana: Sore muscles trigger a lighter next load by choice.
variants.west_africa: Body ache steers next task size down.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une douleur corporelle me pousse à réduire la taille de la tâche suivante.

variants.global: Mental fatigue makes me switch to a simple hands task for a while.
variants.ghana: Brain tired sends me to easy hand work awhile.
variants.west_africa: Thinking drain moves me to plain manual chores.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La fatigue de réflexion me pousse vers des tâches manuelles simples.

variants.global: I split a huge cleaning job across several days on purpose.
variants.ghana: Massive cleaning spreads across planned days.
variants.west_africa: Big clean gets day-sliced plan.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un grand nettoyage se découpe en plan sur la journée.

variants.global: I sleep longer after an unusually demanding day.
variants.ghana: Extra-hard day extends my sleep the night after.
variants.west_africa: Big demand day lengthens next sleep.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une journée très exigeante allonge mon sommeil du lendemain.

variants.global: I take notes during long talks so my mind can rest between points.
variants.ghana: Long speech gets note fragments so my mind breathes.
variants.west_africa: Extended talk pairs with jotting breaks for me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une longue conversation s'accompagne de pauses pour noter.

variants.global: I set a visible timer to work in focused bursts on dull tasks.
variants.ghana: Boring work runs in timed visible bursts.
variants.west_africa: Timer chunks carry dull work.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des morceaux minutés portent le travail ennuyeux.

variants.global: I stop work for food before I feel shaky.
variants.ghana: Meal breaks come before shaky hunger.
variants.west_africa: Food pause precedes shakiness.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une pause repas précède les tremblements ou vertiges.

variants.global: I celebrate small finished pieces of a long project aloud or in text to someone.
variants.ghana: Tiny milestones get a spoken or text cheer to another person.
variants.west_africa: Micro wins get shared praise.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les petites victoires méritent d'être partagées à voix haute.

variants.global: After conflict talk, I need quiet alone time before the next social task.
variants.ghana: Hot words exchange needs solo quiet before next people task.
variants.west_africa: Argument aftermath needs alone buffer.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Après une dispute, j'ai besoin d'un temps seul pour me remettre.

variants.global: A hard failed attempt makes me shelve the task for days.
variants.ghana: Tough fail shelves the job many days.
variants.west_africa: Failure sends long shelf time.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un échec envoie la tâche au placard longtemps.

variants.global: I jump straight into the next heavy chore without water or sit.
variants.ghana: Back-to-back heavy chores without pause is my pattern.
variants.west_africa: No sit or sip between hard rounds.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je ne m'assois ni ne bois entre les manches d'effort intense.

variants.global: Boring important tasks often spill to another day unfinished.
variants.ghana: Dull needed work crosses days open.
variants.west_africa: Important drudge lingers unfinished.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les corvées importantes traînent inachevées.

variants.global: I ignore early muscle soreness and repeat the same heavy load.
variants.ghana: Early soreness ignored; same load repeated.
variants.west_africa: Soreness does not shrink next task.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La douleur ne réduit pas la tâche suivante pour moi.

variants.global: Mental fatigue makes me stop all work rather than switch task type.
variants.ghana: Brain tired halts everything.
variants.west_africa: Think-tired ends the work block fully.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La fatigue mentale met fin au bloc de travail complètement.

variants.global: I try to finish huge cleaning in one long push.
variants.ghana: Whole clean in one marathon session is my pull.
variants.west_africa: One-shot giant clean attempts.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'attaque les grands nettoyages d'un seul coup.

variants.global: Demanding day rarely changes how long I sleep.
variants.ghana: Hard day does not stretch night sleep.
variants.west_africa: Sleep length stable after strain.
variants.francophone_west_africa: La durée de mon sommeil reste stable après un effort intense.

variants.global: I rely on memory alone through long talks without jotting.
variants.ghana: Long talks need no notes from me.
variants.west_africa: Memory holds long talks solo.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je retiens seul les longues conversations sans notes.

variants.global: Dull tasks run without timers until something interrupts.
variants.ghana: No burst timers on boring work.
variants.west_africa: Open-ended grind on dull jobs.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je reste sur des corvées ennuyeuses sans limite de temps.

variants.global: I work through hunger until shaking or headache appears.
variants.ghana: Hunger ignored until body signals hard.
variants.west_africa: Food waits for strong body complaint.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je repousse le repas jusqu'à une plainte corporelle forte.

variants.global: I move on to the next task without noting what I finished.
variants.ghana: Finished slices pass without acknowledgment.
variants.west_africa: No micro-celebration between chunks.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je ne célèbre pas les petites étapes entre les morceaux.

variants.global: After conflict talk I go straight into the next crowded task.
variants.ghana: Argument then immediate crowd task is fine for me.
variants.west_africa: No solo buffer needed after tense talk.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je n'ai pas besoin d'un temps seul après un échange tendu.

variants.global: A few minutes with my eyes closed rarely changes how tired I feel.
variants.ghana: Short quiet with my eyes shut seldom shifts my tired level.
variants.west_africa: A brief eye rest rarely lifts my energy.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une courte pause des yeux relève rarement mon énergie.

variants.global: I understand a new physical skill faster when someone shows me once.
variants.ghana: Seeing a move once beats hearing many words for my body learning.
variants.west_africa: Demo-first beats long verbal-only coaching for my hands.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une démonstration avant de longs discours seuls convient mieux à mes mains.

variants.global: Spoken steps alone are enough for me to copy a simple new routine.
variants.ghana: Voice-only instructions carry simple new routines for me.
variants.west_africa: Hearing the order is enough without pictures.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Entendre l'ordre des étapes suffit sans images.

variants.global: I repeat a new phrase aloud several times to lock it in.
variants.ghana: Fresh phrases get loud repeats to stick.
variants.west_africa: New wording needs spoken loops.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un nouveau motage demande des répétitions à voix haute.

variants.global: I draw a quick map or diagram to explain where something is.
variants.ghana: Place explanation gets a fast sketch from me.
variants.west_africa: Location questions get doodle answers.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les questions de lieu reçoivent des croquis en réponse.

variants.global: I learn from a mistake if the wrong outcome is shown clearly.
variants.ghana: Clear wrong result teaches me fast.
variants.west_africa: Visible error outcome educates me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Voir le résultat d'une erreur m'enseigne.

variants.global: I ask the teacher or guide to slow down when hands and words move too fast together.
variants.ghana: Hands plus words too fast triggers a slow request from me.
variants.west_africa: I request slower combo demo when rushed.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je demande une démo plus lente quand on va trop vite.

variants.global: I tie a new name to a face feature so I recall it next time.
variants.ghana: Face detail anchors new names for me.
variants.west_africa: Feature hook holds names.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un détail saillant fixe les noms dans ma mémoire.

variants.global: I use objects around me as props when telling a story.
variants.ghana: Storytelling grabs nearby objects as examples.
variants.west_africa: Tales include prop pointing.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Mes récits incluent montrer un objet du doigt.

variants.global: Long written instructions tire me; short bullet lists work better.
variants.ghana: Paragraph manuals drain me; bullets help.
variants.west_africa: Wall-of-text rules lose me; lists win.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un mur de texte me perd ; les listes gagnent.

variants.global: I practice a new dance or sport move in slow motion first.
variants.ghana: Fresh moves start in slow motion.
variants.west_africa: New motor pattern begins slow.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un nouveau geste moteur commence lentement pour moi.

variants.global: I learn a group game faster after one practice round than after only rules talk.
variants.ghana: One trial round beats rules lecture for group games.
variants.west_africa: Play round teaches group rules faster for me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un tour d'essai enseigne les règles de groupe plus vite.

variants.global: Charts with colors help me compare amounts at a glance.
variants.ghana: Color bars make amount gaps obvious to my eyes.
variants.west_africa: Hue-coded charts speed compare.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Des tableaux en couleur accélèrent la comparaison.

variants.global: Watching once is not enough; I need several repeats before my body copies.
variants.ghana: Single demo is too thin; repeats needed for my body.
variants.west_africa: Multi-repeat watch before motor copy.
variants.francophone_west_africa: J'ai besoin de plusieurs reprises avant de copier le geste.

variants.global: Spoken steps alone are not enough; I need a picture or gesture.
variants.ghana: Voice-only is thin; picture or hand cue needed.
variants.west_africa: Words alone miss for new routines.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les mots seuls ne suffisent pas pour les nouvelles routines.

variants.global: I lock new phrases silently in my head without saying them aloud.
variants.ghana: Silent mental loop stores new wording.
variants.west_africa: No loud repeats needed for phrases.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je n'ai pas besoin de répéter fort les phrases nouvelles.

variants.global: I describe a place with words only and skip drawing.
variants.ghana: Word picture without sketch is my habit.
variants.west_africa: No doodle for directions.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je ne fais pas de croquis pour les directions.

variants.global: Mistakes confuse me unless someone walks through the right steps slowly.
variants.ghana: Errors need slow correct walkthrough.
variants.west_africa: Wrong tries need guided redo.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les essais ratés demandent une reprise guidée pour moi.

variants.global: Fast hands with fast talk during demo feels fine to me.
variants.ghana: Rapid demo pace matches my learning.
variants.west_africa: Speedy combo demo fits me.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une démo rapide enchaînée me convient.

variants.global: I recall new names without linking them to face details.
variants.ghana: Names stick without feature tricks.
variants.west_africa: Face hooks unused.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je n'utilise pas les visages comme ancres mnémotechniques.

variants.global: I tell stories with words only and rarely point to objects.
variants.ghana: Object-free storytelling is my style.
variants.west_africa: Props seldom appear in my tales.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les objets apparaissent rarement dans mes récits.

variants.global: Long written instructions feel clearer than very short bullets.
variants.ghana: Full paragraphs beat ultra-short bullets for me.
variants.west_africa: Dense text guides me well.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Un texte dense me guide bien.

variants.global: I practice new moves at full speed from the first try.
variants.ghana: Day-one new moves run full tempo.
variants.west_africa: No slow-motion ramp.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Je n'ai pas besoin de commencer un geste au ralenti.

variants.global: Rules talk alone is enough for me before a group game starts.
variants.ghana: Pre-game lecture carries me without practice round.
variants.west_africa: Verbal rules pre-play suffice.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les règles verbales avant le jeu me suffisent.

variants.global: Color charts feel optional; numbers alone are enough.
variants.ghana: Numeric tables beat color bars for me.
variants.west_africa: Plain numbers compare fine.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Les nombres simples comparent bien pour moi.

variants.global: Written checklist beats live demo for my learning style.
variants.ghana: Paper checklist tops live show for me.
variants.west_africa: List beats watching.
variants.francophone_west_africa: Une liste écrite me convient mieux que regarder une démonstration.
